reference: A headache can be a result of elevated blood pressure, or even blood pressure can be elevated due to headache itself. Swelling may occur due to the dilation of blood vessels, which can be a response to pain. Just keep your blood pressure under control. Make a blood pressure chart with frequent readings. Also, get your lipid profile checked.
text: A headache can be a result of elevated blood pressure, or even blood pressure can be elevated due to headache itself. Swelling may occur due to the dilation of blood vessels, which can be a response to pain. Just keep your blood pressure under control. Make a blood pressure chart with frequent readings.
